_setup: ⚠️  DEPRECATED — Continue.dev was acquired by Cursor and is shutting down.
Continue.dev v2.0.0 (June 19 2026) is the FINAL release.
DATA EXPORT DEADLINE: July 15, 2026 — after this date your data is deleted.
Export your data NOW: Settings > Export Data in the Continue extension.
- Cursor (free tier available) — acquired Continue, closest replacement
- Aider (open-source, terminal-first) — works with this proxy out of the box
- Claude Code CLI — works with this proxy via Anthropic compat layer
This config still works for existing installs but receives no updates.
Replace YOUR_TUNNEL_URL with the output of get_tunnel_url.ps1 on your home PC
Replace YOUR_API_KEY with one of the keys from your .env file

models.title: Qwen3-Coder 30B (Recommended)
models.systemMessage: Answer directly. Do not reveal reasoning. For code tasks, inspect the provided context before answering.

models.systemMessage: Answer directly. Do not reveal reasoning.
